situation: SK-RE-011 (audit-2026-07-02-003): session.js:38 exec() timeout silently resolves with truncated buffer. Callers treating partial output as complete can corrupt downstream shell state or misparse command results. Priority 9 pending fix without case_id.
action: Changed exec() Promise from resolve-only to resolve/reject. Timeout handler now rejects with Error carrying code='EXEC_TIMEOUT' and partialOutput property for caller inspection. Fail-fast semantics prevent silent data corruption in push.js/pull.js/connect() callers.
outcome_evidence: commit 3296a4f on auto/opt-runner-exec-1782940040 pushed to origin; precommit guard passed silently; git diff shows +8/-3 lines replacing resolve(result) with reject(err) carrying EXEC_TIMEOUT code and partialOutput attachment
